title: hibbertia ferox
intro: Hibbertia ferox, also known as the prickly guinea flower, is a small shrub native to the eastern coast of Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hibbertia ferox include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its use in treating skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Hibbertia ferox can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, teas, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a qualified healthcare practitioner.
